30009.title: Sanctions and the Exchange Rate
30009.abstract: We show that the exchange rate may appreciate or depreciate depending on the specific mix of sanctions imposed, even if the underlying equilibrium allocation is the same. Sanctions that limit a country's imports tend to appreciate the country’s exchange rate, while sanctions that limit exports and/or freeze net foreign assets tend to depreciate it. Increased precautionary household demand for foreign currency is another force that depreciates the exchange rate, and it can be offset with domestic financial repression of foreign currency savings. The overall effect depends on the balance of currency demand and currency supply forces, where exports and official reserves contribute to currency supply and imports and foreign currency precautionary savings contribute to currency demand. Domestic economic downturn and government fiscal deficits are additional forces that affect the equilibrium exchange rate. The dynamic behavior of the ruble exchange rate following Russia's military invasion of Ukraine in February 2022 and the resulting sanctions is entirely consistent with the combined effects of these mechanisms.
30009.zh_abstract: 我们表明，即使潜在均衡分配相同，汇率可能升值或贬值，具体取决于所施加制裁的具体组合。限制一国进口的制裁往往使其汇率升值，而限制出口和/或冻结净外国资产的制裁则往往使其贬值。家庭预防性外汇需求的增加是另一种使汇率贬值的因素，这可以通过对国内外汇储蓄的金融压制来抵消。总体效应取决于货币需求与货币供给力量的平衡，其中出口和官方储备有助于货币供给，而进口和预防性外汇储蓄则构成货币需求。国内经济衰退和政府财政赤字是影响均衡汇率的其他因素。2022年2月俄罗斯军事入侵乌克兰及随之而来的制裁后卢布汇率的动态行为，与这些机制的综合效应完全一致。
30009.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, POL；JEL：E50, F31, F32, F41, F51

30008.title: Automatic Tax Filing: Simulating a Pre-Populated Form 1040
30008.zh_title: 自动报税：模拟预填的1040表格
30008.authors: Lucas Goodman, Katherine Lim, Bruce Sacerdote, Andrew Whitten
30008.abstract: Each year Americans spend over 1.7 billion hours and $\$33$ billion preparing individual tax returns, and these filing costs are regressive. To lower and redistribute the filing burden, researchers and policymakers have proposed having the IRS prepopulate tax returns for individuals. We evaluate this hypothetical policy using a large, nationally representative sample of returns filed for tax year 2019. Our baseline results indicate that between 66 and 75 million returns (42 to 48 percent of all returns) could be accurately pre-populated using only current-year information returns and the prior-year return. Accuracy rates decline with income and are higher for taxpayers who have fewer dependents or are unmarried. We also examine 2019 non-filers, finding that pre-populated returns tentatively indicate $\$8.2$ billion in refunds due to 11 million (20 percent) of them.
30008.zh_abstract: 每年，美国人花费超过17亿小时和330亿美元来准备个人纳税申报表，这些申报成本是累退的。为了降低和重新分配申报负担，研究人员和政策制定者提议由美国国税局为个人预填纳税申报表。我们使用2019纳税年度提交的、具有全国代表性的大样本申报表来评估这一假设性政策。我们的基准结果表明，仅使用当年的信息申报表和上一年度的申报表，就能准确预填6600万至7500万份申报表（占所有申报表的42%至48%）。准确率随收入增加而下降，对于受抚养人较少或未婚的纳税人，准确率更高。我们还研究了2019年的未申报者，发现预填申报表初步显示，其中1100万人（占20%）应获得82亿美元的退税。

30007.title: Measuring the Valuation of Liquidity with Penalized Withdrawals
30007.zh_title: 通过惩罚性取款衡量流动性估值
30007.authors: David Coyne, Itzik Fadlon, Tommaso Porzio
30007.abstract: We introduce penalized withdrawals from retirement savings accounts as a new revealed-preference tool to measure households' valuation of liquidity. This approach addresses key empirical challenges by providing a proxy for marginal utility without requiring assumptions on preferences or data on access to credit. Using U.S. administrative tax data from 1999-2018, we document three main findings. First, geographic differences, driven by local credit supply, account for over 30% of the nationwide variation in the valuation of liquidity across labor markets. Second, areas hit hardest by the Great Recession saw large increases in the valuation of liquidity, with local credit market spillovers explaining two-thirds of the effect. Third, Black households rely more heavily on penalized withdrawals, even after controlling for income and location, consistent with limited access to formal credit. Together, these findings highlight significant scope for welfare gains through more targeted safety-net policies and demonstrate the practical value of penalized withdrawals as a tool for monitoring liquidity needs.
30007.zh_abstract: 我们引入从退休储蓄账户中惩罚性取款作为一种新的显示性偏好工具，用于衡量家庭对流动性的估值。这种方法通过提供边际效用的代理变量，无需对偏好做出假设或获取信贷渠道数据，从而解决了关键的经验挑战。利用1999年至2018年的美国行政税收数据，我们记录了三个主要发现。首先，由当地信贷供给驱动的地理差异，解释了全国各劳动力市场流动性估值差异的30%以上。其次，受大衰退冲击最严重的地区，流动性估值大幅上升，其中当地信贷市场溢出效应解释了三分之二的影响。第三，即使在控制收入和地点后，黑人家庭更依赖惩罚性取款，这与他们获得正规信贷的渠道有限相一致。这些发现共同凸显了通过更有针对性的安全网政策实现福利收益的巨大空间，并证明了惩罚性取款作为监测流动性需求工具的实际价值。
30007.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, PE；JEL：D14, D53, D61, E21, G51, H0, I38, J15, R1

30006.title: Cryptocurrencies and Decentralized Finance (DeFi)
30006.zh_title: 加密货币与去中心化金融（DeFi）
30006.abstract: The paper provides an overview of cryptocurrencies and decentralized finance. The discussion lays out potential benefits and challenges of the new system and presents a comparison to the traditional system of financial intermediation. Our analysis highlights that while the DeFi architecture might have the potential to reduce transaction costs, similar to the traditional financial system, there are several layers where rents can accumulate due to endogenous constraints to competition. We show that the permissionless and pseudonymous design of DeFi generates challenges for enforcing tax compliance, anti-money laundering laws, and preventing financial malfeasance. We highlight ways to regulate the DeFi system which would preserve a majority of benefits of the underlying blockchain architecture but support accountability and regulatory compliance.
30006.zh_abstract: 本文概述了加密货币和去中心化金融。讨论阐述了新系统的潜在优势和挑战，并与传统金融中介系统进行了比较。我们的分析强调，尽管DeFi架构可能具有降低交易成本的潜力，但与传统金融系统类似，由于竞争的内生约束，租金可能在多个层面累积。我们表明，DeFi的无许可和伪匿名设计给执行税收合规、反洗钱法律以及防止金融违法行为带来了挑战。我们提出了监管DeFi系统的方法，这些方法将保留底层区块链架构的大部分优势，同时支持问责制和监管合规。
30006.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：G1, G2, G20, G21, G23, G3

30005.title: On Criteria for Evaluating Social Programs
30005.zh_title: 论评估社会项目的标准
30005.authors: Jorge Luis García, James J. Heckman
30005.abstract: This paper examines the economic foundations of some recently proposed criteria for evaluating the benefits of social programs. These criteria are appropriate for comparing a class of revenue-constant policies. They replace foundational principles of social opportunity costs with accounting conventions from the point of view of government bureaucrats. They do not address the question of social optimality associated with programs that expand or contract the government budget.
30005.zh_abstract: 本文考察了近期提出的一些用于评估社会项目效益标准的经济学基础。这些标准适用于比较一类收入恒定的政策。它们用政府官僚视角的会计惯例取代了社会机会成本的基本原则。它们没有解决与扩大或缩小政府预算的项目相关的社会最优性问题。

30004.title: A Tale of Two Networks: Common Ownership and Product Market Rivalry
30004.zh_title: 两个网络的故事：共同所有权与产品市场竞争
30004.abstract: We study the welfare implications of the rise of common ownership in the United States from 1995 to 2021. We build a general equilibrium model with a hedonic demand system in which firms compete in a network game of oligopoly. Firms are connected through two large networks: the first reflects ownership overlap, the second product market rivalry. In our model, common ownership of competing firms induces unilateral incentives to soften competition and the magnitude of the common ownership effect depends on how much the two networks overlap. We estimate our model for the universe of U.S. public corporations using a combination of firm financials, investor holdings, and text-based product similarity data. We perform counterfactual calculations to evaluate how the efficiency and the distributional impact of common ownership have evolved over time. According to our estimates the welfare cost of common ownership, measured as the ratio of deadweight loss to total surplus, has increased about nine-fold between 1995 and 2021. Under various corporate governance models the deadweight loss of common ownership ranges between 3.5% and 13.2% of total surplus in 2021. The rise of common ownership has also resulted in a significant reallocation of surplus from consumers to producers.
30004.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1995年至2021年美国共同所有权兴起的福利影响。我们构建了一个具有享乐需求系统的一般均衡模型，在该模型中，企业在寡头垄断的网络博弈中竞争。企业通过两个大型网络相连：第一个反映所有权重叠，第二个反映产品市场竞争。在我们的模型中，竞争企业的共同所有权会引发单方面削弱竞争的激励，而共同所有权效应的大小取决于这两个网络的重叠程度。我们结合公司财务数据、投资者持股数据和基于文本的产品相似度数据，对美国所有上市公司进行了模型估计。我们进行了反事实计算，以评估共同所有权的效率和分配效应如何随时间演变。根据我们的估计，以无谓损失与总剩余之比衡量的共同所有权福利成本，在1995年至2021年间增加了约九倍。在各种公司治理模型下，2021年共同所有权的无谓损失占总剩余的3.5%至13.2%之间。共同所有权的兴起还导致了剩余从消费者向生产者的显著重新分配。
30004.meta: Programs：CF, IO, PR；JEL：D43, D85, E23, G23, G34, L16, L21

30003.title: Faith and Assimilation: Italian Immigrants in the US
30003.zh_title: 信仰与同化：美国的意大利移民
30003.abstract: How do ethnic religious organizations influence immigrants’ assimilation in host societies? This paper offers the first systematic answer to this question by focusing on Italian Catholic churches in the US between 1890 and 1920, when four million Italians moved to America, and anti-Catholic sentiments were widespread. Relying on newly collected data on the presence of Italian Catholic churches across counties over time, we implement a difference-in-differences design. We find that Italian churches reduced the social assimilation of Italian immigrants, lowering intermarriage, residential integration, and naturalization rates. We provide evidence that stronger coordination within the Italian community and natives' backlash and negative stereotyping can explain these effects. Despite the negative effects on Italians' social assimilation, Italian churches had ambiguous effects on immigrants' economic outcomes, and increased children's literacy and ability to speak English.
30003.zh_abstract: 种族宗教组织如何影响移民在东道国的同化？本文通过聚焦1890年至1920年间美国意大利天主教堂，首次系统回答了这个问题。在此期间，四百万意大利人移居美国，反天主教情绪普遍存在。依靠新收集的关于各县意大利天主教堂随时间存在情况的数据，我们实施了一个双重差分设计。我们发现，意大利教堂降低了意大利移民的社会同化程度，降低了通婚率、居住融合率和入籍率。我们提供的证据表明，意大利社区内部更强的协调以及本土居民的抵制和负面刻板印象可以解释这些效应。尽管对意大利人的社会同化有负面影响，但意大利教堂对移民的经济成果影响不明确，并提高了儿童的识字率和英语能力。

30002.title: Complexity and Satisficing: Theory with Evidence from Chess
30002.zh_title: 复杂性与满意化：来自国际象棋的证据与理论
30002.abstract: We develop a satisficing model of choice in which the available alternatives differ in their inherent complexity. We assume—and experimentally validate—that complexity leads to errors in the perception of alternatives’ values. The model yields sharp predictions about the effect of complexity on choice probabilities, some of which qualitatively contrast with those of maximization-based choice models. We confirm the predictions of the satisficing model—and thus reject maximization—in a novel data set with information on hundreds of millions of real-world chess moves by highly experienced players. These findings point to the importance of complexity and satisficing for decision making outside of the laboratory.
30002.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个满意化选择模型，其中可用选项在其固有复杂性上有所不同。我们假设——并通过实验验证——复杂性会导致对选项价值的感知错误。该模型对复杂性如何影响选择概率产生了清晰的预测，其中一些预测在性质上与基于最大化的选择模型形成对比。我们在一个包含经验丰富的棋手数亿次真实世界国际象棋走法信息的新数据集中，证实了满意化模型的预测——从而拒绝了最大化模型。这些发现指出了复杂性和满意化在实验室外决策中的重要性。

30001.title: Values as Luxury Goods and Political Polarization
30001.zh_title: 价值观作为奢侈品与政治极化
30001.authors: Benjamin Enke, Mattias Polborn, Alex Wu
30001.abstract: This paper develops a theory of political behavior in which values are a luxury good: the relative weight that voters place on values rather than material considerations increases in income. This idea both generates new testable implications and ties together a broad set of empirical regularities about political polarization in the U.S. The model predicts (i) voters who are sufficiently rich to afford voting left; (ii) that more rich than poor people vote against their material interests; (iii) that Democrats are internally more fragmented than Republicans; and (iv) widely-discussed realignments: rich moral liberals who swing Democrat, and poor moral conservatives who swing Republican. Assuming that parties set policies by aggregating their supporters’ preferences, the model also predicts increasing social party polarization over time, such that poor moral conservatives swing Republican even though their relative incomes decreased. We relate these predictions to known stylized facts, and test our new predictions empirically.
30001.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种政治行为理论，其中价值观是一种奢侈品：选民赋予价值观相对于物质考量的权重随收入增加而上升。这一观点既产生了新的可检验推论，又将美国政治极化的一系列广泛经验规律联系起来。模型预测：(i) 足够富裕的选民会投票支持左翼；(ii) 富裕选民中违背自身物质利益投票的人数多于贫困选民；(iii) 民主党内部比共和党更加分裂；(iv) 广泛讨论的重新结盟现象：富裕的道德自由派转向民主党，而贫困的道德保守派转向共和党。假设政党通过汇总其支持者的偏好来制定政策，模型还预测社会性政党极化随时间加剧，以至于贫困的道德保守派尽管相对收入下降，仍转向共和党。我们将这些预测与已知的典型事实相关联，并对新预测进行了经验检验。

30000.title: The US COVID-19 Baby Bust and Rebound
30000.zh_title: 美国COVID-19婴儿潮低谷与反弹
30000.authors: Melissa Schettini Kearney, Phillip B. Levine
30000.abstract: We document the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on births in the United States. First, using Vital Statistics birth data on the universe of US births, we show that the US pandemic initially was associated with a “baby bust” period, from August 2020 through February 2021. During these seven months, there were nearly 100,000 fewer births than predicted based on pre-existing birth trends and seasonality. Many of these missing births would have been conceived after the pandemic began in March of 2020, consistent with a behavioral fertility response to pandemic conditions. Other missing births would have been conceived before the onset of the pandemic. Some of these are attributable to reduced immigration of pregnant women and some to altered pregnancy outcomes for women who were pregnant during the early months of the pandemic. We further document a COVID birth rebound between March and September 2021, amounting to about 30,000 more births than predicted. Second, we document variation across US states in the size of the baby bust and rebound and investigate how that variation statistically relates to contextual factors. The bust was larger in states with larger increases in the unemployment rate, a larger reduction in household spending, and more COVID cases. The rebound was larger in states that experienced larger improvements in the labor market and household spending, consistent with a positive effect of economic conditions on birth rates, and smaller in places that had mask mandates, consistent with a dampening role of social anxiety about the ongoing pandemic.
30000.zh_abstract: 我们记录了COVID-19大流行对美国出生人数的影响。首先，利用涵盖全美出生人口的《生命统计》出生数据，我们表明美国大流行初期与“婴儿潮低谷”时期相关，时间从2020年8月持续至2021年2月。在这七个月中，基于既有出生趋势和季节性预测的出生人数减少了近10万。这些缺失的出生中，许多本应在2020年3月大流行开始后受孕，这与生育行为对大流行状况的反应一致。其他缺失的出生则在大流行爆发前就已受孕，其中部分可归因于孕妇移民减少，部分可归因于大流行初期怀孕女性的妊娠结局改变。我们进一步记录了2021年3月至9月间COVID出生反弹，比预测多出约3万出生人数。其次，我们记录了美国各州在婴儿潮低谷和反弹规模上的差异，并探究这种差异如何与情境因素在统计上相关。失业率上升幅度更大、家庭支出减少更多以及COVID病例更多的州，婴儿潮低谷更为严重。劳动力市场和家庭支出改善更大的州，反弹幅度更大，这与经济状况对出生率的正向影响一致；而实施口罩令的地区反弹较小，这与对持续大流行的社会焦虑的抑制作用一致。

30029.title: The Case for Using the MVPF in Empirical Welfare Analysis
30029.zh_title: 在经验福利分析中使用边际公共资金价值的理由
30029.abstract: This paper outlines the case for using the Marginal Value of Public Funds (MVPF) in empirical welfare analysis. It compares the MVPF approach with more traditional welfare metrics such as the Cost-Benefit Ratio and the Net Social Benefits criterion. It outlines the advantages of the MVPF approach relative to these metrics. In building the case for the MVPF, this paper also addresses several misconceptions about the MVPF that appear in recent literature.
30029.zh_abstract: 本文概述了在经验福利分析中使用边际公共资金价值（MVPF）的理由。它将MVPF方法与更传统的福利指标（如成本效益比和净社会效益标准）进行了比较。它概述了MVPF方法相对于这些指标的优势。在构建MVPF理由的过程中，本文还澄清了近期文献中出现的关于MVPF的几个误解。
30029.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EEE, EH, IO, LS, PE；JEL：H0

30028.title: GDPR and the Lost Generation of Innovative Apps
30028.zh_title: 通用数据保护条例与失去的创新应用一代
30028.authors: Rebecca Janßen, Reinhold Kesler, Michael E. Kummer, Joel Waldfogel
30028.abstract: Using data on 4.1 million apps at the Google Play Store from 2016 to 2019, we document that GDPR induced the exit of about a third of available apps; and in the quarters following implementation, entry of new apps fell by half. We estimate a structural model of demand and entry in the app market. Comparing long-run equilibria with and without GDPR, we find that GDPR reduces consumer surplus and aggregate app usage by about a third. Whatever the privacy benefits of GDPR, they come at substantial costs in foregone innovation.
30028.zh_abstract: 利用2016年至2019年Google Play商店中410万个应用的数据，我们记录了《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）导致约三分之一可用应用退出市场；在实施后的几个季度里，新应用的进入数量下降了一半。我们估计了一个应用市场需求和进入的结构模型。比较有和没有GDPR的长期均衡，我们发现GDPR使消费者剩余和总应用使用量减少了约三分之一。无论GDPR的隐私收益如何，它们都以牺牲创新为代价，代价是巨大的。

30027.title: Local Carbon Policy
30027.abstract: We study local carbon policy to address the consequences of climate change. Standard analysis suggests that the social cost of carbon determines optimal carbon policy. We start by using the spatial integrated assessment model in Cruz and Rossi-Hansberg (2021) to measure the local social monetary cost of CO² emissions: the Local Social Cost of Carbon (LSCC). Although the largest welfare costs from global warming are concentrated in the warmest parts of the developing world, adjusting for the local marginal utility of income implies that the LSCC peaks in warm and high-income regions like the southern parts of the U.S. and Europe, as well as Australia. We then proceed to study the effect of the actual carbon reduction pledges in the Paris Agreement and the progress they can make in implementing the expressed goal of keeping global temperature increases below 2°C. We find that although the distribution of pledges is roughly in line with the LSCC, their magnitude is largely insufficient to achieve its goals. The required carbon taxes necessary to keep temperatures below 2°C over the current century are an order of magnitude higher and involve large implicit inter-temporal transfers. Increasing the elasticity of substitution across energy sources is important to reduce the carbon taxes necessary to achieve warming goals.
30027.zh_abstract: 我们研究应对气候变化后果的地方碳政策。标准分析表明，碳的社会成本决定了最优碳政策。我们首先使用Cruz和Rossi-Hansberg（2021）的空间综合评估模型来测量CO²排放的地方社会货币成本：地方碳社会成本（LSCC）。尽管全球变暖带来的最大福利成本集中在发展中国家最温暖的地区，但根据地方收入边际效用进行调整后，LSCC在温暖且高收入的地区（如美国和欧洲南部以及澳大利亚）达到峰值。然后，我们继续研究《巴黎协定》中实际碳减排承诺的效果，以及这些承诺在实现将全球气温上升控制在2°C以下这一既定目标方面所能取得的进展。我们发现，尽管承诺的分布大致与LSCC一致，但其规模远不足以实现其目标。在本世纪内将气温控制在2°C以下所需的碳税要高出一个数量级，并且涉及大量的隐性跨期转移。提高能源之间替代弹性对于降低实现升温目标所需的碳税至关重要。
30027.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：F1, O18, Q5, R1

30026.title: Pricing Risk Globally: Intermediary Constraints, the Dollar, and the Global Financial Cycle
30026.zh_title: 不确定性冲击、资本流动与国际风险溢出
30026.authors: Özge Akinci, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Albert Queralto
30026.abstract: Foreign investors’ changing appetite for risk-taking have been shown to be a key determinant of the global financial cycle. Such fluctuations in risk sentiment also correlate with the dynamics of UIP premia, capital flows, and exchange rates. To understand how these risk sentiment changes transmit across borders, we propose a two-country macroeconomic framework. Our model features cross-border holdings of risky assets by U.S. financial intermediaries who operate under financial frictions, and who act as global intermediaries in that they take on foreign asset risk. In this setup, an exogenous increase in U.S.-specific uncertainty, modeled as higher volatility in U.S. assets, leads to higher risk premia in both countries. This occurs because higher uncertainty leads to deleveraging pressure on U.S. intermediaries, triggering higher global risk premia and lower global asset values. Moreover, when U.S. uncertainty rises, the exchange rate in the foreign country vis-à-vis the dollar depreciates, capital flows out of the foreign country, and the UIP premium increases in the foreign country and decreases in the U.S., as in the data.
30026.zh_abstract: 外国投资者风险偏好的变化已被证明是全球金融周期的关键决定因素。这种风险情绪的波动也与未覆盖利率平价溢价、资本流动和汇率的动态相关。为了理解这些风险情绪变化如何跨境传导，我们提出了一个两国宏观经济框架。我们的模型以美国金融中介机构跨境持有风险资产为特征，这些中介机构在金融摩擦下运营，并作为全球中介机构承担外国资产风险。在这种设定下，美国特定不确定性的外生增加（建模为美国资产波动性上升）会导致两国风险溢价上升。这是因为更高的不确定性导致美国中介机构去杠杆压力，引发全球风险溢价上升和全球资产价值下降。此外，当美国不确定性上升时，外国货币兑美元汇率贬值，资本流出外国，外国未覆盖利率平价溢价上升而美国下降，这与数据一致。
30026.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM；JEL：F3, F31, F32, F4, F41, F44

30025.title: State Dependent Government Spending Multipliers: Downward Nominal Wage Rigidity and Sources of Business Cycle Fluctuations
30025.zh_title: 状态依赖的政府支出乘数：名义工资下行刚性与经济周期波动的根源
30025.abstract: We consider a New Keynesian model with downward nominal wage rigidity (DNWR) and show that government spending is much more effective in stimulating output in a low-inflation recession relative to a high-inflation recession. The government spending multiplier is large when DNWR binds, but the nature of recession matters due to the opposing response of inflation. In a demand-driven recession, inflation falls, preventing real wages from falling, leading to unemployment, while inflation rises in a supply-driven recession limiting the consequences of DNWR on employment. We document supporting empirical evidence, using both historical time series data and cross-sectional data from U.S. states.
30025.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含名义工资下行刚性（DNWR）的新凯恩斯主义模型，并证明政府支出在低通胀衰退时期对产出的刺激效果远强于高通胀衰退时期。当DNWR约束生效时，政府支出乘数较大，但衰退的性质因通胀的相反反应而至关重要。在需求驱动的衰退中，通胀下降，阻止实际工资下降，导致失业；而在供给驱动的衰退中，通胀上升，限制了DNWR对就业的影响。我们利用历史时间序列数据和美国各州的横截面数据，提供了支持性的实证证据。

30024.title: Government Debt and Capital Accumulation in an Era of Low Interest Rates
30024.zh_title: 低利率时代的政府债务与资本积累
30024.abstract: This essay discusses the reasons for and implications of the decline in real interest rates around the world over the past several decades. It suggests that the decline in interest rates is largely explicable from trends in saving, growth, and markups. In this environment, greater government debt is likely not problematic from a budgetary standpoint. But a Ponzi-like scheme of perpetual debt rollover might fail, and such a failure would make an already-bad state of the world even worse. In addition, even if a perpetual debt rollover succeeds, the increased debt could still crowd out capital, reducing labor productivity, real wages, and consumption.
30024.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了过去几十年来全球实际利率下降的原因及其影响。文章指出，利率下降在很大程度上可以从储蓄、增长和加成率的趋势中得到解释。在这种环境下，从预算角度来看，更高的政府债务可能不会带来问题。但类似庞氏骗局的永久债务展期方案可能会失败，而这种失败将使本已糟糕的世界状况雪上加霜。此外，即使永久债务展期成功，增加的债务仍可能挤出资本，降低劳动生产率、实际工资和消费。
30024.meta: Programs：EFG, PE；JEL：E13, E22, E62, H41, H63

30023.title: Q-Monetary Transmission
30023.abstract: We study the effects of monetary-policy-induced changes in Tobin's q on corporate investment and capital structure. We develop a theory of the mechanism, provide empirical evidence, evaluate the ability of the quantitative theory to match the evidence, and quantify the relevance for monetary transmission to aggregate investment.
30023.zh_abstract: 我们研究了货币政策引起的托宾Q值变化对企业投资和资本结构的影响。我们提出了该机制的理论，提供了实证证据，评估了定量理论匹配证据的能力，并量化了其对货币政策传导至总投资的关联性。
30023.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D83, E22, E44, E52, G12, G31, G32

30022.title: Data and Markups: A Macro-Finance Perspective
30022.zh_title: 数据与加成率：宏观金融视角
30022.abstract: What does market power look like in a data economy? Economists typically use markups to measure market power. However, we use a simple model to show how firms’ growing stocks of data can change markups, without changing their power to affect prices. Data’s effects depend on how markups are aggregated. Growing data can produce differences in markup measures that match empirical facts. Markup aggregation wedges can measure data stocks and offer a way to purge markups of data’s effects to reveal market power.
30022.zh_abstract: 在数据经济中，市场势力呈现何种形态？经济学家通常使用加成率来衡量市场势力。然而，我们使用一个简单模型展示了企业不断增长的数据存量如何改变加成率，而不改变其影响价格的能力。数据的影响取决于加成率如何加总。不断增长的数据可能导致加成率指标出现差异，这与实证事实相符。加成率加总楔子可以衡量数据存量，并提供一种方法，以剔除数据对加成率的影响，从而揭示市场势力。
30022.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO, ME；JEL：D8, E3, L0

30021.title: Analyzing the Agenda of the U.K. Parliament Over the Long Run
30021.zh_title: 长期视角下英国议会议程分析
30021.abstract: This article develops a method for quantitatively tracking the agenda of the British Parliament—by which I mean the substantive topics on which Parliamentary debate was focused—from 1810-2005 using descriptions of 1.7 million Parliamentary debates from the Parliamentary Hansard. This provides a new tool for analyzing the evolution of the British political system across nearly two centuries. I describe and validate this new measure and then present an application that focuses on assessing the influence of the party in government on the Parliamentary agenda.
30021.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种方法，利用《英国议会议事录》中170万次议会辩论的描述，定量追踪1810年至2005年间英国议会的议程——即议会辩论所聚焦的实质性议题。这为分析近两个世纪以来英国政治体系的演变提供了新工具。我们描述并验证了这一新指标，然后提出了一个应用，重点评估执政党对议会议程的影响。

30020.title: International Trade and the Environment: Three Remaining Empirical Challenges
30020.zh_title: 国际贸易与环境：三个尚存的实证挑战
30020.authors: Jevan M. Cherniwchan, M. Scott Taylor
30020.abstract: Considerable progress has been made in our understanding of the relationship between international trade and the environment since Gene Grossman and Alan Krueger published their now seminal working paper examining the potential environmental effects of the North American Free Trade Agreement in 1991. This review uses their original paper as a guide to highlight key developments along three main branches of research that all stem from their analysis: (i) the interaction between international trade, economic growth, and environmental outcomes, (ii) the role of environmental regulation in determining trade and investment flows, and (iii) estimating the relative magnitudes of the scale, composition, and technique effects induced by trade. It discusses key developments along each branch, with a particular focus on the empirical challenges that have impeded progress. It also highlights an area along each branch that is ripe for further study. These areas are termed the Three Remaining Challenges.
30020.zh_abstract: 自Gene Grossman和Alan Krueger于1991年发表其开创性的工作论文，探讨北美自由贸易协定潜在的环境影响以来，我们对国际贸易与环境关系的理解取得了显著进展。本综述以其原始论文为指导，重点阐述了源于其分析的三个主要研究分支的关键发展：（i）国际贸易、经济增长与环境结果之间的相互作用；（ii）环境规制在决定贸易和投资流动中的作用；以及（iii）估算贸易引发的规模效应、结构效应和技术效应的相对大小。本文讨论了每个分支的关键发展，特别关注阻碍进展的实证挑战。同时，指出了每个分支中值得进一步研究的领域。这些领域被称为“三个尚存的挑战”。

30019.title: Population, Productivity, and Sustainable Consumption
30019.zh_title: 人口、生产率与可持续消费
30019.abstract: How does the sustainable level of consumption depend on productivity growth and the size and growth rate of the population? What is the effect of uncertainty over these growth rates? I address these questions using a model in which productivity and population growth are stochastic, and social welfare allows for human lives to have (positive or negative) intrinsic value. I show how the maximum sustainable consumption-wealth ratio depends on expected rates of productivity and population growth, the volatility of those growth rates, and the extent to which welfare depends directly on the size of the population. For plausible parameter values, the sustainable consumption-wealth ratio is well below the optimal ratio that maximizes welfare. This raises a question: Given its cost, should sustainability be a social objective?
30019.zh_abstract: 可持续消费水平如何取决于生产率增长以及人口的规模和增长率？这些增长率的不确定性有何影响？我使用一个模型来探讨这些问题，该模型中生产率和人口增长是随机的，社会福利允许人类生命具有（正或负的）内在价值。我展示了最大可持续消费-财富比率如何取决于预期的生产率和人口增长率、这些增长率的波动性，以及福利在多大程度上直接依赖于人口规模。对于合理的参数值，可持续消费-财富比率远低于最大化福利的最优比率。这引发了一个问题：考虑到其成本，可持续性是否应成为社会目标？

30018.title: Top Income Inequality and Tax Policy
30018.zh_title: 顶层收入不平等与税收政策
30018.authors: Isaac Delestre, Wojciech Kopczuk, Helen Miller, Kate Smith
30018.abstract: The share of pre-tax income flowing to the top of the UK income distribution increased continually and substantially in the three decades leading up to the financial crisis, but has changed little since 2013. Using microdata sampled from UK tax records, we describe the nature of top incomes in the UK and how they are taxed. We show that wage income is the dominant source of pre-tax income, even for highest-income 0.1% of UK adults. But, ‘active’ business income – derived from self-employment or closely-held incorporated businesses – is considerably more important for the top 1% than for those with lower incomes. High-income wage earners work disproportionately in financial services. The high-income self-employed are predominately working in partnerships in professions such as accountancy and legal services. Overall, UK income taxes are progressive: average tax rates rise with income. Taxes on top incomes have been increased since 2010, with the result that the post-tax share of income flowing to the top has fallen. But average tax rates vary significantly within the top and depend on how income is received. Incomes from business ownership and investment are taxed at lower rates than employment income. We discuss options for reforming the taxation of top incomes.
30018.zh_abstract: 在金融危机前的三十年里，英国收入分配顶层人群的税前收入份额持续且大幅上升，但自2013年以来变化甚微。利用从英国税收记录中抽样的微观数据，我们描述了英国顶层收入的性质及其征税方式。我们表明，即使对于英国收入最高的0.1%成年人，工资收入也是税前收入的主要来源。但是，对于收入最高的1%人群而言，“主动”经营收入——来自自雇或紧密持有的公司企业——比收入较低者重要得多。高收入工薪阶层不成比例地集中在金融服务行业。高收入自雇人士主要是在会计、法律服务等行业的合伙制企业中工作。总体而言，英国所得税是累进的：平均税率随收入上升而提高。自2010年以来，对顶层收入的税收有所增加，导致流向顶层的税后收入份额下降。但在顶层内部，平均税率差异很大，且取决于收入的获取方式。来自企业所有权和投资的收入税率低于就业收入。我们讨论了改革顶层收入征税的选项。

30017.title: Aligned with Whom? Direct and Social Goals for AI Systems
30017.zh_title: 与谁对齐？人工智能系统的直接目标与社会目标
30017.abstract: As artificial intelligence (AI) becomes more powerful and widespread, the AI alignment problem—how to ensure that AI systems pursue the goals that we want them to pursue—has garnered growing attention. This article distinguishes two types of alignment problems depending on whose goals we consider, and analyzes the different solutions necessitated by each. The direct alignment problem considers whether an AI system accomplishes the goals of the entity operating it. In contrast, the social alignment problem considers the effects of an AI system on larger groups or on society more broadly. In particular, it also considers whether the system imposes externalities on others. Whereas solutions to the direct alignment problem center around more robust implementation, social alignment problems typically arise because of conflicts between individual and group-level goals, elevating the importance of AI governance to mediate such conflicts. Addressing the social alignment problem requires both enforcing existing norms on their developers and operators and designing new norms that apply directly to AI systems.
30017.zh_abstract: 随着人工智能（AI）变得更加强大和普及，AI对齐问题——即如何确保AI系统追求我们希望它们追求的目标——已引起越来越多的关注。本文根据我们考虑的是谁的目标，区分了两种类型的对齐问题，并分析了每种问题所需的不同解决方案。直接对齐问题考虑的是AI系统是否实现了操作它的实体的目标。相比之下，社会对齐问题则考虑AI系统对更大群体或更广泛社会的影响。特别是，它还考虑了系统是否对他人施加了外部性。解决直接对齐问题的方法主要围绕更稳健的实施，而社会对齐问题通常由于个体目标与群体目标之间的冲突而产生，从而提升了AI治理在调解此类冲突中的重要性。解决社会对齐问题需要既对开发者和操作者执行现有规范，也设计直接适用于AI系统的新规范。

30016.title: The Dynamic Impact of Market Integration: Evidence from Renewable Energy Expansion in Chile
30016.zh_title: 市场一体化的动态影响：来自智利可再生能源扩张的证据
30016.authors: Luis E. Gonzales, Koichiro Ito, Mar Reguant
30016.abstract: Effective and economical expansion of renewable energy is one of the most urgent and important challenges of addressing climate change. However, many countries are facing a problem because existing network infrastructures (i.e., transmission networks) were not originally built to accommodate renewables, which creates disconnections between demand centers and renewable supply. In this paper, we study the static and dynamic impacts of market integration on renewable energy expansion. Our theory highlights that statically, market integration improves allocative efficiency by gains from trade, and dynamically, it incentivizes new entry of renewable power plants. Using two recent grid expansions in the Chilean electricity market, we empirically test our theoretical predictions and show that commonly-used event study estimation underestimates the dynamic benefits if renewable investments occur in anticipation of market integration. We build a structural model of power plant entry and show how to correct for such bias. We find that market integration resulted in price convergence across regions, increases in renewable generation, and decreases in generation cost and pollution emissions. Furthermore, a substantial amount of renewable entry would not have occurred in the absence of market integration. We show that ignoring this dynamic effect would substantially understate the benefits of transmission investments.
30016.zh_abstract: 有效且经济地扩张可再生能源是应对气候变化最紧迫和最重要的挑战之一。然而，许多国家正面临一个问题，因为现有的网络基础设施（即输电网络）最初并非为容纳可再生能源而建，这造成了需求中心与可再生能源供应之间的脱节。在本文中，我们研究了市场一体化对可再生能源扩张的静态和动态影响。我们的理论强调，静态上，市场一体化通过贸易收益提高了配置效率；动态上，它激励了新的可再生能源发电厂的进入。利用智利电力市场最近的两次电网扩张，我们实证检验了我们的理论预测，并表明如果可再生能源投资预期到市场一体化而提前发生，常用的事件研究估计会低估动态收益。我们构建了一个发电厂进入的结构模型，并展示了如何纠正这种偏差。我们发现，市场一体化导致了地区间价格趋同、可再生能源发电量增加以及发电成本和污染排放减少。此外，如果没有市场一体化，大量可再生能源的进入本不会发生。我们表明，忽略这种动态效应会严重低估输电投资的收益。
30016.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, IO, ITI；JEL：L94, L97, Q41, Q42, Q53, Q56

30015.title: Bunching and Taxing Multidimensional Skills
30015.zh_title: 聚集与多维技能的征税
30015.authors: Job Boerma, Aleh Tsyvinski, Alexander P. Zimin
30015.abstract: We characterize optimal policies in a multidimensional nonlinear taxation model with bunching. We develop an empirically relevant model with cognitive and manual skills, firm heterogeneity, and labor market sorting. The analysis of optimal policy is based on two main results. We first derive an optimality condition − a general ABC formula − that states that the entire schedule of benefits of taxes second order stochastically dominates the entire schedule of tax distortions. Second, we use Legendre transforms to represent our problem as a linear program. This linearization allows us to solve the model quantitatively and to precisely characterize the regions and patterns of bunching. At an optimum, 9.8 percent of workers is bunched both locally and nonlocally. We introduce two notions of bunching – blunt bunching and targeted bunching. Blunt bunching constitutes 30 percent of all bunching, occurs at the lowest regions of cognitive and manual skills, and lumps the allocations of these workers resulting in a significant distortion. Targeted bunching constitutes 70 percent of all bunching and recognizes the workers’ comparative advantage. The planner separates workers on their dominant skill and bunches them on their weaker skill, thus mitigating distortions along the dominant skill dimension. Tax wedges are particularly high for low skilled workers who are bluntly bunched and are also high along the dimension of comparative disadvantage for somewhat more skilled workers who are targetedly bunched.
30015.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了具有聚集现象的多维非线性税收模型中的最优政策。我们构建了一个具有认知技能和手工技能、企业异质性和劳动力市场分类的实证相关模型。最优政策分析基于两个主要结果。首先，我们推导出一个最优条件——一个通用的ABC公式——该公式表明税收收益的整个序列在二阶随机占优意义上支配税收扭曲的整个序列。其次，我们使用勒让德变换将我们的问题表示为一个线性规划。这种线性化使我们能够定量求解模型，并精确刻画聚集的区域和模式。在最优状态下，9.8%的工人同时存在局部和非局部聚集。我们引入了两种聚集概念——钝性聚集和靶向聚集。钝性聚集占所有聚集的30%，发生在认知技能和手工技能的最低区域，并将这些工人的配置混为一谈，导致显著的扭曲。靶向聚集占所有聚集的70%，并识别了工人的比较优势。规划者根据工人的主导技能将他们分离，并根据他们的较弱技能将他们聚集，从而减轻了沿主导技能维度的扭曲。税收楔子对于被钝性聚集的低技能工人特别高，并且对于被靶向聚集的稍高技能工人，沿比较劣势维度也较高。

30014.title: Weighted-Average Quantile Regression
30014.authors: Denis Chetverikov, Yukun Liu, Aleh Tsyvinski
30014.abstract: In this paper, we introduce the weighted-average quantile regression model. We argue that this model is of interest in many applied settings and develop an estimator for parameters of this model. We show that our estimator is √T-consistent and asymptotically normal with mean zero under weak conditions, where T is the sample size. We demonstrate the usefulness of our estimator in two empirical settings. First, we study the factor structures of the expected shortfalls of the industry portfolios. Second, we study inequality and social welfare dependence on individual characteristics.
30014.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们引入了加权平均分位数回归模型。我们认为该模型在许多应用场景中具有价值，并为该模型的参数开发了一个估计量。我们证明，在弱条件下，我们的估计量是√T-一致的且渐近正态分布，均值为零，其中T是样本量。我们在两个实证场景中展示了我们估计量的实用性。首先，我们研究了行业投资组合预期短缺的因子结构。其次，我们研究了不平等和社会福利对个体特征的依赖性。

30013.title: The Marginal Propensity to Consume in Heterogeneous Agent Models
30013.zh_title: 异质性主体模型中的边际消费倾向
30013.abstract: What model features and calibration strategies yield a large average marginal propensity to consume (MPC) in heterogeneous agent models? Through a systematic investigation of models with different preferences, dimensions of ex-ante heterogeneity, income processes and asset structure, we show that the most important factor is the share and type of hand-to-mouth households. One-asset models either feature a trade-off between a high average MPC and a realistic level of aggregate wealth, or generate an excessively polarized wealth distribution that vastly understates the wealth held by households in the middle of the distribution. Two-asset models that include both liquid and illiquid assets can resolve this tension with a large enough gap between liquid and illiquid returns. We discuss how such return differential can be justified from the perspective of theory and data.
30013.zh_abstract: 在异质性主体模型中，哪些模型特征和校准策略能产生较大的平均边际消费倾向（MPC）？通过对具有不同偏好、事前异质性维度、收入过程和资产结构的模型进行系统研究，我们表明最重要的因素是手到口家庭的比例和类型。单资产模型要么在较高的平均MPC和现实的总体财富水平之间存在权衡，要么产生一个过度两极分化的财富分布，严重低估了处于分布中间的家庭持有的财富。包含流动性和非流动性资产的双资产模型可以通过在流动性和非流动性回报之间设置足够大的差距来解决这一矛盾。我们讨论了如何从理论和数据的角度证明这种回报差异的合理性。
30013.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：D15, D31, D52, E21, E62, E71, G51

30012.title: Credibility and Explicit Inflation Targeting
30012.zh_title: 可信度与明确的通胀目标制
30012.authors: Robert G. King, Yang K. Lu
30012.abstract: In his 2004 inflation targeting manifesto, Marvin Goodfriend described US monetary policy as implicit inflation targeting and advocated explicit targeting. Summarizing the 1965-2000 US inflation experience, he highlighted the importance of evolving Fed credibility, which accords with our recent work using a quantitative New Keynesian model. We define credibility as policy consistency with a publicly announced framework and develop two lessons theoretically. First, under explicit targeting, no conflict arises between flexible inflation targeting and maintaining/accumulating credibility. Second, implicit targeting reduces the effectiveness of expectations management and stabilization policy, as well as opening the door to costly inflation scare episodes
30012.zh_abstract: 在他2004年的通胀目标制宣言中，Marvin Goodfriend将美国货币政策描述为隐性的通胀目标制，并倡导明确的通胀目标制。总结1965-2000年美国通胀经验时，他强调了美联储可信度演变的重要性，这与我们最近使用定量新凯恩斯模型的研究一致。我们将可信度定义为政策与公开宣布的框架的一致性，并从理论上发展出两个教训。首先，在明确的目标制下，灵活的通胀目标制与维持/积累可信度之间不会产生冲突。其次，隐性的目标制降低了预期管理和稳定政策的有效性，并为代价高昂的通胀恐慌事件打开了大门。

30011.title: The Long-Run Effects of Psychotherapy on Depression, Beliefs, and Economic Outcomes
30011.zh_title: 心理治疗对抑郁、信念和经济结果的长期影响
30011.authors: Bhargav Bhat, Jonathan de Quidt, Johannes Haushofer, Vikram H. Patel, Gautam Rao, Frank Schilbach, Pierre-Luc P. Vautrey
30011.abstract: We revisit two clinical trials that randomized depressed adults in India (n=775) to a brief course of psychotherapy or a control condition. Four to five years later, the treatment group was 11 percentage points less likely to be depressed than the control group. The more effective intervention averted 9 months of depression on average over five years and cost only $\$66$ per recipient. Therapy changed people’s beliefs about themselves in three ways. First, it reduced their likelihood of seeing themselves as a failure or feeling bad about themselves. Second, when faced with a novel work opportunity, therapy reduced over-optimistic belief updating in response to feedback and thus reduced overconfidence. Third, it increased self-assessed levels of patience and altruism. Therapy did not increase levels of employment or consumption, possibly because of other constraints on employment in the largely female study sample.
30011.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了两项临床试验，这些试验将印度抑郁成年人（n=775）随机分配到短期心理治疗课程或对照组。四到五年后，治疗组患抑郁症的可能性比对照组低11个百分点。更有效的干预措施在五年内平均避免了9个月的抑郁发作，且每位接受者的成本仅为66美元。治疗以三种方式改变了人们对自己的信念。首先，它降低了他们将自己视为失败者或自我感觉糟糕的可能性。其次，当面对新的工作机会时，治疗减少了因反馈而产生的过度乐观信念更新，从而降低了过度自信。第三，它提高了自我评估的耐心和利他主义水平。治疗并未提高就业或消费水平，这可能是因为在以女性为主的研究样本中存在其他就业约束。

30010.title: The Consequences of Remote and Hybrid Instruction During the Pandemic
30010.zh_title: 疫情期间远程和混合教学的影响
30010.authors: Dan Goldhaber, Thomas J. Kane, Andrew McEachin, Emily Morton, Tyler Patterson, Douglas O. Staiger
30010.abstract: Using testing data from 2.1 million students in 10,000 schools in 49 states (plus D.C.), we investigate the role of remote and hybrid instruction in widening gaps in achievement by race and school poverty. We find that remote instruction was a primary driver of widening achievement gaps. Math gaps did not widen in areas that remained in-person (although there was some widening in reading gaps in those areas). We estimate that high-poverty districts that went remote in 2020-21 will need to spend nearly all of their federal aid on academic recovery to help students recover from pandemic-related achievement losses.
30010.zh_abstract: 利用来自49个州（加上哥伦比亚特区）10000所学校210万学生的测试数据，我们调查了远程和混合教学在扩大按种族和学校贫困程度划分的成就差距中的作用。我们发现远程教学是成就差距扩大的主要驱动因素。在保持面对面教学的地区，数学差距并未扩大（尽管这些地区的阅读差距有所扩大）。我们估计，在2020-21学年采取远程教学的高贫困学区将需要将几乎所有的联邦援助用于学业恢复，以帮助学生从疫情相关的学业损失中恢复过来。

30058.title: Voting on a Trade Agreement: Firm Networks and Attitudes Toward Openness
30058.zh_title: 对贸易协定的投票：企业网络与对开放的态度
30058.abstract: We exploit a unique event to study the extent to which popular attitudes toward trade are driven by economic fundamentals. In 2007, Costa Rica put a free trade agreement (FTA) to a national referendum. With a single question on the ballot, 59% of Costa Rican adult citizens cast a vote on whether they wanted an FTA with the United States to be ratified or not. We merge disaggregated referendum results, which break new ground on anonymity-compatible voting data, with employer-employee, customs, and firm-to-firm transactions data, and data on household composition and expenditures. We document that a firm’s exposure to the FTA, directly and via input-output linkages, significantly influences the voting behavior of its employees. This effect dominates that of sector-level exposure and is greater for voters aligned with pro-FTA political candidates. We also show that citizens considered the expected decrease in consumer prices when exercising their vote. Overall, economic factors explain 7% of the variation in voting patterns, which cannot be accounted for by non-economic factors such as political ideology, and played a pivotal role in this vote.
30058.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个独特的事件来研究公众对贸易的态度在多大程度上由经济基本面驱动。2007年，哥斯达黎加将一项自由贸易协定提交全国公投。选票上只有一个问题，59%的哥斯达黎加成年公民投票决定是否批准与美国的一项自由贸易协定。我们将细分的公投结果（这为匿名兼容的投票数据开辟了新天地）与雇主-雇员数据、海关数据、企业间交易数据以及家庭构成和支出数据合并。我们记录到，一家企业直接或通过投入产出联系对自由贸易协定的暴露程度，会显著影响其员工的投票行为。这种效应超过了行业层面暴露程度的影响，并且对于支持自由贸易协定的政治候选人的选民来说更为显著。我们还表明，公民在投票时考虑了预期的消费者价格下降。总体而言，经济因素解释了投票模式中7%的变异，这无法由政治意识形态等非经济因素解释，并且在此次投票中发挥了关键作用。
30058.meta: Programs：DEV, IFM, ITI, POL；JEL：D72, F13, F14, F68, O24

30057.title: Financial Inclusion, Economic Development, and Inequality: Evidence from Brazil
30057.zh_title: 金融包容性、经济发展与不平等：来自巴西的证据
30057.abstract: We study a financial inclusion policy targeting Brazilian cities with low bank branch coverage using data on the universe of employees from 2000–2014. The policy leads to bank entry and to similar increases in both deposits and lending. It also fosters entrepreneurship, employment, and wage growth, especially for cities initially in banking deserts. These gains are not shared equally and instead increase with workers’ education, implying a substantial increase in wage inequality. The changes in inequality are concentrated in cities where the initial supply of skilled workers is low, indicating that talent scarcity can drive how financial development affects inequality.
30057.zh_abstract: 我们利用2000-2014年全体雇员的数据，研究了一项针对巴西银行网点覆盖率低城市的金融包容性政策。该政策导致银行进入，并使得存款和贷款均出现类似增长。它还促进了创业、就业和工资增长，尤其是在最初处于“银行沙漠”的城市。但这些收益并非平等分享，而是随着工人教育水平的提高而增加，这意味着工资不平等显著加剧。不平等的变化集中在初始熟练工人供给较低的城市，这表明人才稀缺性可能驱动金融发展如何影响不平等。
30057.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, LS, PR；JEL：G2, H8, J2, J3, O1, O43

30056.title: The Supplemental Poverty Measure: A New Method for Measuring Poverty
30056.zh_title: 补充贫困衡量指标：一种衡量贫困的新方法
30056.abstract: We propose a new measure of the rate of poverty we call the Supplemental Expenditure Poverty Measure (SEPM) based on expenditure in the Consumer Expenditure survey. It treats household expenditure as a measure of resources available to purchase the minimum bundle necessary to meet basic needs. Our measure differs from conventional income and consumption poverty in both concept and measurement and it has advantages relative to both. Poverty rates using our basic measure are very close in level and recent trend to those of the most preferred income-based poverty rate produced by the Census Bureau. But our SEPM poverty rate differs from the Census measure at different levels of the poverty line. For example, that the number of individuals living in either poor or “almost” poor households is 5 percentage points greater (about 16 million individuals) using our measure. We also construct an augmented measure that adds additional potential liquid resources. This “maximal resources” measure indicates that if disadvantaged households used up all their bank balances and maximized their credit card borrowing, 9.6 percent of the population (over 31 million individuals) would still be poor and unable to purchase the goods necessary for the basic needs of life.
30056.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新的贫困率衡量指标，称为补充性支出贫困衡量指标（SEPM），该指标基于消费者支出调查中的支出数据。它将家庭支出视为可用于购买满足基本需求所需最低限度商品组合的资源衡量指标。我们的指标在概念和测量上均不同于传统的收入贫困和消费贫困，并且相对于两者都有优势。使用我们基本指标得出的贫困率，在水平和近期趋势上与人口普查局最常用的基于收入的贫困率非常接近。但我们的SEPM贫困率在贫困线的不同水平上与人口普查指标存在差异。例如，根据我们的指标，生活在贫困或“近乎”贫困家庭中的个体数量多出5个百分点（约1600万人）。我们还构建了一个增强型指标，增加了额外的潜在流动性资源。这个“最大资源”指标表明，如果弱势家庭用尽所有银行存款并最大化信用卡借贷，仍有9.6%的人口（超过3100万人）将处于贫困状态，无法购买维持基本生活所需的商品。

30055.title: Economic Integration and the Transmission of Democracy
30055.zh_title: 经济一体化与民主的传播
30055.abstract: In this paper, we study the effects of economic integration with democracies on individuals’ democratic values and on countries’ institutions. We combine survey data with country level measures of democracy from 1960 to 2015, and exploit improvements in air, relative to sea, transportation to derive a time-varying instrument for trade. We find that economic integration with democracies increases both citizens’ support for democracy and countries’ democracy scores. Instead, trade with non-democracies has no impact on either attitudes or institutions. The effects of trade with democracies are stronger when partners have a longer history of democracy, grow faster, spend more on public goods, and are culturally closer. They are also driven by imports, rather than exports, and by integration with partners that export higher quality goods and that account for a larger share of a country’s trade in institutionally intensive, cultural, and consumer goods as well as in goods that involve more face-to-face interactions and entail higher levels of bilateral trust. These patterns are consistent with trade in goods favoring the transmission of democracy by signaling the (actual or perceived) desirability of the latter. We examine alternative mechanisms, and conclude that none of them can, alone, explain our findings.
30055.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们研究了与民主国家的经济一体化对个人民主价值观和国家制度的影响。我们将1960年至2015年的调查数据与国家层面的民主衡量指标相结合，并利用航空运输相对于海运的改善来推导贸易的时变工具变量。我们发现，与民主国家的经济一体化既增加了公民对民主的支持，也提高了国家的民主得分。相反，与非民主国家的贸易对态度或制度均无影响。当贸易伙伴具有更长的民主历史、增长更快、在公共品上支出更多且文化上更接近时，与民主国家贸易的影响更强。这些影响还由进口而非出口驱动，并且是由与那些出口更高质量商品、在一国制度密集型、文化及消费品贸易中占更大份额、以及涉及更多面对面互动和更高双边信任水平的伙伴进行一体化所驱动的。这些模式与商品贸易通过传递民主的（实际或感知的）可取性信号来促进民主传播是一致的。我们考察了其他机制，并得出结论，没有任何一种机制能单独解释我们的发现。

30054.title: Addressing Non-Financial Barriers to College Access and Success: Evidence and Policy Implications
30054.zh_title: 应对大学入学与成功的非金融障碍：证据与政策启示
30054.authors: Susan Dynarski, Aizat Nurshatayeva, Lindsay C. Page, Judith Scott-Clayton
30054.abstract: Non-financial barriers to college are an important possible explanation for socioeconomic, racial, gender, and other gaps in college access and success. A sizeable economic literature documents policy efforts to understand and address these barriers. We review this literature on non-financial interventions for improving college access and success ranging from discreet and narrowly defined interventions to comprehensive and multifaceted programs and systemic-level solutions.
30054.zh_abstract: 大学的非金融障碍是解释社会经济、种族、性别及其他群体在大学入学与成功方面差距的一个重要可能原因。大量经济学文献记录了旨在理解和应对这些障碍的政策努力。我们回顾了关于改善大学入学与成功的非金融干预措施的文献，这些干预措施范围从具体且狭义定义的干预措施到全面且多方面的项目以及系统性层面的解决方案。

30053.title: Bargaining and International Reference Pricing in the Pharmaceutical Industry
30053.zh_title: 制药行业的议价与国际参考定价
30053.authors: Pierre Dubois, Ashvin Gandhi, Shoshana Vasserman
30053.abstract: The United States spends twice as much per person on pharmaceuticals as European countries, in large part because prices are much higher in the US. This fact has led policymakers to consider legislation for price controls. This paper assesses the effects of a US international reference pricing policy that would cap prices in US markets by those offered in reference countries. We estimate a structural model of demand and supply for pharmaceuticals in the US and reference countries like Canada where prices are set through a negotiation process between pharmaceutical companies and the government. We then simulate the counterfactual equilibrium under such international reference pricing rules, allowing firms to internalize the cross-country externalities introduced by these policies. We find that in general, these policies would result in much smaller price decreases in the US than price increases in reference countries. The magnitude of these effects depends on the number, size and market structure of references countries. We compare these policies with a direct bargaining on prices in the US.
30053.zh_abstract: 美国在药品上的人均支出是欧洲国家的两倍，很大程度上是因为美国药品价格高得多。这一事实促使政策制定者考虑实施价格管制立法。本文评估了一项美国国际参考定价政策的效果，该政策将美国市场的价格上限设定为参考国家提供的价格。我们估计了美国和加拿大等参考国家（这些国家的价格通过制药公司与政府之间的谈判过程设定）药品需求与供给的结构模型。然后，我们在此类国际参考定价规则下模拟反事实均衡，允许企业内化这些政策引入的跨国外部性。我们发现，总体而言，这些政策将导致美国价格下降的幅度远小于参考国家价格上涨的幅度。这些影响的大小取决于参考国家的数量、规模和市场结构。我们将这些政策与在美国直接进行价格谈判进行了比较。
30053.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：C51, C57, I11, I18, L11, L13, L22

30052.title: Skill Heterogeneity and Aggregate Labor Market Dynamics
30052.zh_title: 技能异质性与总体劳动力市场动态
30052.abstract: This paper studies aggregate labor market dynamics when workers have heterogeneous skills for tasks which are subject to non-uniform labor demand shocks. When workers have different skills, movements in aggregate wages partly reflect a reallocation of different workers across tasks and into employment. This ensures that there nearly always exists some combination of task-specific demand shocks that induce aggregate employment and wages to negatively comove even in a frictionless economy. Furthermore, such reallocations would be interpreted either as a labor wedge or as a shift in an aggregate labor supply curve in representative agent economies. Developing a method to estimate the multidimensional skill distribution, I show that a frictionless model with realistic heterogeneity can replicate the mean wage increase and employment collapse of the Great Recession. Reduced-form composition-adjustment methods recover positive co-movements between employment and wages in recent periods suggesting an increasing role for composition effects through time, which the model rationalizes through changes in the skill distribution and composition of sectoral shocks.
30052.zh_abstract: 本文研究了当工人对面临非均匀劳动力需求冲击的任务具有异质性技能时，总体劳动力市场的动态变化。当工人拥有不同技能时，总体工资的变动部分反映了不同工人在不同任务之间以及进入就业状态的重新配置。这确保了即使在无摩擦经济中，也几乎总是存在某种任务特定需求冲击的组合，能够导致总体就业和工资呈负向联动。此外，在代表性代理人经济中，这种重新配置将被解释为劳动力楔子或总体劳动力供给曲线的移动。通过开发一种估计多维技能分布的方法，我表明一个具有现实异质性的无摩擦模型可以复制大衰退期间的平均工资增长和就业崩溃。近期数据中，简化形式的构成调整方法恢复了就业与工资之间的正联动，表明构成效应随时间推移的作用日益增强，而该模型通过技能分布和部门冲击构成的变化对此进行了合理化解释。

30051.title: The Demand for Money, Near-Money, and Treasury Bonds
30051.zh_title: 对货币、准货币和国债的需求
30051.abstract: Bank-created money, shadow-bank money, and Treasury bonds all satisfy investors' demand for a liquid transaction medium and safe store of value. We measure the quantity of these three forms of liquidity and their corresponding liquidity premium over a sample from 1934 to 2016. We empirically examine the links between these different assets, estimating the extent to which they are substitutes, and the amount of liquidity per unit delivered by each asset. Treasury bonds and bank deposits are imperfect substitutes, in contrast to the findings of perfect substitutes of Nagel (2016). This result is directly relevant to the monetary transmission mechanism running through shifts in asset supplies, such as quantitative easing policies. Our results on the imperfect substitutability of bank and shadow-bank money also inform analyses of the coexistence of the shadow-banking and regulated banking system. We construct a new broad monetary aggregate based on our estimates and show that it helps resolve the money-demand instability and missing-money puzzles of the monetary economics literature.
30051.zh_abstract: 银行创造的货币、影子银行货币和国债都满足了投资者对流动性交易媒介和安全价值储存的需求。我们衡量了1934年至2016年样本期间这三种流动性形式的数量及其相应的流动性溢价。我们实证检验了这些不同资产之间的联系，估计了它们之间的替代程度以及每种资产每单位提供的流动性数量。国债和银行存款是不完全替代品，这与Nagel（2016）发现的完全替代品结论形成对比。这一结果与通过资产供给变动（如量化宽松政策）发挥作用的货币传导机制直接相关。我们关于银行和影子银行货币不完全替代性的结论也为分析影子银行与受监管银行体系共存提供了信息。我们基于估计结果构建了一个新的广义货币总量，并表明它有助于解决货币经济学文献中的货币需求不稳定性和“失踪货币”之谜。
30051.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E41, E43, G21, G23

30050.title: Small Campaign Donors
30050.authors: Laurent Bouton, Julia Cagé, Edgard Dewitte, Vincent Pons
30050.abstract: We build a new dataset of all 340 million individual contributions reported to the U.S. Federal Election Commission 2005-2020 to study the characteristics and behavior of small campaign donors. The reporting requirements of fundraising platforms such as ActBlue enable us to observe contribution-level information on the vast majority of small donations, which have grown rapidly since 2005. Small donors differ from large donors in gender, ethnicity, and income, and they are more representative of the U.S. population. They act less strategically than large donors, respond more to candidates’ public prominence, and are more susceptible to TV and social media ads.
30050.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含2005年至2020年间向美国联邦选举委员会报告的所有3.4亿笔个人捐款的新数据集，以研究小额竞选捐款人的特征和行为。ActBlue等筹款平台的报告要求使我们能够观察到绝大多数小额捐款的捐款层面信息，这些小额捐款自2005年以来迅速增长。小额捐款人在性别、种族和收入方面与大额捐款人不同，并且更能代表美国人口。他们比大额捐款人更少采取策略性行动，对候选人的公众知名度反应更强烈，并且更容易受到电视和社交媒体广告的影响。

30049.title: Cognitive Behavior Therapy Reduces Crime and Violence over 10 Years: Experimental Evidence
30049.zh_title: 认知行为疗法在10年内减少犯罪与暴力：实验证据
30049.authors: Christopher Blattman, Sebastian Chaskel, Julian C. Jamison, Margaret Sheridan
30049.abstract: Several small, short-term, or non-experimental studies show that cognitive behavioral informed trainings reduce antisocial behaviors for 1–2 years. But there is no large-scale, long-term research on persistence. We follow 999 high-risk men in Liberia 10 years after randomization into: 8 weeks of low-cost therapy, $\$200$ cash, both, or a control group. A decade later, men receiving therapy or therapy with cash were about half as likely as the control group to engage in various antisocial behaviors, including robbery, drug selling, and street fights—far exceeding expert predictions. Impacts are concentrated in the highest-risk men, and most robust from therapy with cash.
30049.zh_abstract: 几项小型、短期或非实验性研究表明，认知行为导向的培训可在1-2年内减少反社会行为。但目前缺乏关于其持久性的大规模、长期研究。我们对利比里亚999名高风险男性进行了为期10年的追踪，他们被随机分配到以下组别：8周低成本治疗、200美元现金、两者兼有、或对照组。十年后，接受治疗或治疗加现金的男性从事抢劫、贩毒和街头斗殴等各种反社会行为的可能性约为对照组的一半，这远超专家预测。影响集中在最高风险男性中，且治疗加现金的效果最为显著。

30048.title: Local Shocks and Internal Migration: The Disparate Effects of Robots and Chinese Imports in the US
30048.zh_title: 地方冲击与国内移民：美国机器人与中国进口的差异化影响
30048.authors: Marius Faber, Andrés P. Sarto, Marco Tabellini
30048.abstract: Migration is a key mechanism through which local labor markets adjust to economic shocks. In this paper, we analyze the migration response of American workers to two of the most important shocks that hit US manufacturing since the 1990s: Chinese import competition and the introduction of industrial robots. Exploiting plausibly exogenous variation in exposure across US local labor markets over time, we establish a new fact. Even though both shocks drastically reduced employment in the manufacturing sector, only robots led to a sizable decline in population size. We provide evidence that negative employment spillovers outside manufacturing, caused by robots but not by Chinese imports, can explain the different migration responses. We interpret our findings through the lens of a model that highlights two mechanisms: the cost savings that each shock provides and the degree of complementarity between directly and indirectly exposed industries.
30048.zh_abstract: 移民是地方劳动力市场应对经济冲击的关键机制。本文分析了美国工人对自1990年代以来冲击美国制造业的两大重要冲击——中国进口竞争和工业机器人引入——的移民反应。利用美国各地方劳动力市场随时间变化的、看似外生的暴露程度差异，我们确立了一个新事实。尽管这两种冲击都大幅减少了制造业就业，但只有机器人导致了人口规模的显著下降。我们提供的证据表明，机器人（而非中国进口）造成的制造业以外的负面就业溢出效应，可以解释不同的移民反应。我们通过一个模型来解读我们的发现，该模型强调了两种机制：每种冲击带来的成本节约，以及直接受冲击行业与间接受冲击行业之间的互补程度。

30047.title: Does the Delivery of Primary Health Care Improve Birth Outcomes? Evidence from the Rollout of Community Health Centers
30047.zh_title: 初级卫生保健的提供能否改善出生结局？来自社区卫生中心推广的证据
30047.authors: Esra Kose, Siobhan M. O'Keefe, Maria Rosales-Rueda
30047.abstract: Community Health Centers (CHCs) deliver primary care to underserved populations by locating sliding-scale clinics in economically disadvantaged areas. We investigate how this policy affected infant health using the rollout of CHCs and a flexible event study framework with Vital Statistics natality data. We find that maternal access to CHCs improves infant health outcomes within seven years after their introduction. Treatment-on-the-treated estimates show a 25 to 42 gram increase in birth weight and a 9% to 16% reduction in the likelihood of low birth weight. These improvements in infant health can be explained by increased access to early prenatal care and reductions in maternal smoking.
30047.zh_abstract: 社区卫生中心通过在贫困地区设立按收入比例收费的诊所，为服务不足的人群提供初级保健。我们利用社区卫生中心的推广以及基于生命统计出生数据的灵活事件研究框架，调查了这一政策如何影响婴儿健康。我们发现，在社区卫生中心引入后的七年内，母亲获得社区卫生服务改善了婴儿健康结局。处理组平均处理效应估计显示，出生体重增加了25至42克，低出生体重的可能性降低了9%至16%。婴儿健康的这些改善可以归因于早期产前护理的可及性提高以及母亲吸烟的减少。

30046.title: The Subjective Inflation Expectations of Households and Firms: Measurement, Determinants, and Implications
30046.zh_title: 家庭与企业的主观通胀预期：测量、决定因素及影响
30046.authors: Michael Weber, Francesco D’Acunto, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
30046.abstract: Households’ and firms’ subjective inflation expectations play a central role in macroeconomic and intertemporal microeconomic models. We discuss how subjective inflation expectations are measured, the patterns they display, their determinants, and how they shape households’ and firms’ economic choices in the data and help us make sense of the observed heterogeneous reactions to business-cycle shocks and policy interventions. We conclude by highlighting the relevant open questions and why tackling them is important for academic research and policy making.
30046.zh_abstract: 家庭和企业的主观通胀预期在宏观经济学和跨期微观经济学模型中扮演着核心角色。我们讨论了主观通胀预期如何被测量、它们呈现的模式、其决定因素，以及它们如何在数据中塑造家庭和企业的经济选择，并帮助我们理解观察到的对商业周期冲击和政策干预的异质性反应。最后，我们强调了相关的未解决问题，以及为何解决这些问题对学术研究和政策制定至关重要。
30046.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D1, D2, D8, D9, E2, E3, E4, E5, E7, J1

30045.title: How Should We Measure Infrastructure? The Case of Highways and Streets
30045.zh_title: 我们应如何衡量基础设施？以高速公路和街道为例
30045.abstract: The recent debates on infrastructure spending have led to renewed interest in the measurement of infrastructure and its effects on growth and well-being. This paper updates estimates of one important type of infrastructure capital—highways and streets. We compare BEA’s capital measures with more readily understood physical measures of road and lane miles, road quality and usage, and other measures from Highway Statistics (HS) data from FHWA. We also use the HS data and related research to disaggregate investment in highways and streets into more detailed types, such as new construction, repair and resurfacing, and bridge work, and apply separate depreciation rates to each type to produce updated estimates of net wealth stocks and depreciation. Relative to published BEA estimates, constant-price depreciation is revised up by about $\$9$–$\$12$ billion annually in recent years, and constant-price net stocks are revised down by about 22 percent. For the period from 2007 forward, net stocks per capita are flat in the published BEA estimates but decline slightly in the revised estimates. In addition, we update Fraumeni’s (2007) estimates of productive stocks that are converted to wealth stocks to facilitate a comparison. These updated wealth estimates also show lower net stocks and higher depreciation than in the published BEA estimates. We hope this paper encourages discussion about how to measure infrastructure capital, particularly highways and streets, and its effects.
30045.zh_abstract: 近期关于基础设施支出的辩论重新激发了人们对基础设施衡量及其对增长和福祉影响的兴趣。本文更新了对一种重要基础设施资本——高速公路和街道——的估算。我们将美国经济分析局的资本衡量指标与更易理解的物理衡量指标（如道路和车道里程、道路质量和使用情况）以及来自联邦公路管理局《公路统计》数据的其他衡量指标进行了比较。我们还利用《公路统计》数据及相关研究，将高速公路和街道的投资细分为更详细的类型，如新建、维修和重新铺装、桥梁工程等，并对每种类型应用单独的折旧率，以更新净财富存量和折旧的估算。与美国经济分析局已公布的估算相比，近年来按不变价格计算的折旧每年上调约90亿至120亿美元，按不变价格计算的净存量下调约22%。从2007年至今，美国经济分析局已公布估算中的人均净存量持平，但修订后的估算略有下降。此外，我们更新了Fraumeni（2007）对生产性存量的估算，并将其转换为财富存量以便比较。这些更新的财富估算也显示出比美国经济分析局已公布估算更低的净存量和更高的折旧。我们希望本文能鼓励关于如何衡量基础设施资本（尤其是高速公路和街道）及其影响的讨论。

30044.title: Bargaining over Taxes and Entitlements in the Era of Unequal Growth
30044.zh_title: 不平等增长时代关于税收和福利的谈判
30044.authors: Marina Azzimonti, Laura Karpuska, Gabriel Mihalache
30044.abstract: Entitlement programs have become an increasing component of total government spending in the US over the last six decades. To some observers, this growth of the welfare state is excessive and unwarranted. To others, it is a welcome counter-acting force to the rapid increase in income inequality. Using a political-economy model where parties bargain over taxes and entitlements, we argue that such dynamics can be explained by two factors. The first one is that institutional features of policy determination, in particular budget rules, make the status quo levels of taxes and entitlements difficult to change. The second one is that the country experienced a process of “unequal growth,” where top earners became richer while the income levels of the bottom 50 percent remained stagnant. Richer agents would like the government to provide more public goods as the economy grows. Low-income earners are willing to support such policies only in exchange for an expansion of entitlement programs. Sustained bargaining power by a party that represents the latter, amid budget rules, results in a rising share of entitlements. We explain how parties can take advantage of budget rules to tilt the evolution of policy in their favor in a simple two-period model. We then calibrate an infinite horizon version of the model to the US, and show that it delivers dynamics consistent with the data. Through counter-factual experiments, we find that while entitlements programs are sub-optimally large, welfare outcomes are better than those under alternative budget rules and in scenarios without rules, making it explicit that the type of budget rule matters for both welfare and equity.
30044.zh_abstract: 在过去六十年中，福利项目在美国政府总支出中所占比例日益增加。对某些观察者而言，福利国家的这种扩张是过度且无根据的。对另一些人来说，这是对收入不平等迅速加剧的一种受欢迎的抵消力量。我们使用一个政党就税收和福利进行谈判的政治经济学模型，认为这种动态可以用两个因素来解释。第一个因素是政策制定的制度特征，特别是预算规则，使得税收和福利的现状水平难以改变。第二个因素是该国经历了一个“不平等增长”的过程，其中高收入者变得更富有，而底层50%人口的收入水平停滞不前。随着经济增长，较富裕的个体希望政府提供更多公共品。低收入者愿意支持此类政策，但前提是福利项目得到扩张。在预算规则下，代表后者的政党持续拥有谈判权力，导致福利份额上升。我们通过一个简单的两期模型解释了政党如何利用预算规则使政策演变向有利于自己的方向倾斜。然后，我们将该模型的无限期版本校准到美国，并显示其产生了与数据一致的动态。通过反事实实验，我们发现，尽管福利项目规模过大（非最优），但福利结果优于替代预算规则下以及无规则情景下的结果，这明确表明预算规则的类型对福利和公平都很重要。
30044.meta: Programs：EFG, PE, POL, TWP；JEL：C7, D6, E6, H2, H23, H3, H41, H53

30043.title: The Welfare Implications of Carbon Price Certainty
30043.zh_title: 碳价格确定性的福利含义
30043.authors: Joseph E. Aldy, Sarah C. Armitage
30043.abstract: Experiences in real-world pollution markets suggest that firms make persistent errors in forecasting allowance and credit prices that inform their investment decisions. The residual uncertainty characterizing allowance and credit trading means that pollution markets may fail to deliver cost-effective abatement. This contrasts with price-based policies under which firms make investments that equate marginal abatement cost to an emission tax. We incorporate the additional cost of forecast errors under quantity-based programs into a standard Weitzman-style prices versus quantities framework. We distinguish between individual firms’ uncertainty over competitors’ private information and systemic uncertainty over future cost shocks. We show that a welfare-maximizing regulator would favor price instruments in response to the prospect of firm-specific forecast errors under quantity instruments, ceteris paribus, and the relative benefit of price instruments increases with forecast error variance. We discuss the role of policy design, such as incorporating price collars, in mitigating cost-inefficiencies from price forecast errors.
30043.zh_abstract: 现实世界污染市场的经验表明，企业在预测影响其投资决策的配额和信用价格时会持续犯错。配额和信用交易中存在的剩余不确定性意味着污染市场可能无法实现成本有效的减排。这与基于价格的政策形成对比，在基于价格的政策下，企业进行的投资会使边际减排成本等于排放税。我们将数量型项目下预测误差的额外成本纳入标准的Weitzman式价格与数量比较框架。我们区分了单个企业关于竞争对手私人信息的不确定性和关于未来成本冲击的系统性不确定性。我们表明，在其他条件相同的情况下，面对数量型工具下企业特定的预测误差前景，追求福利最大化的监管者会倾向于价格工具，并且价格工具的相对收益随预测误差方差的增加而增加。我们讨论了政策设计（例如纳入价格区间）在缓解价格预测误差导致的成本低效方面的作用。

30042.title: The Macroeconomic Expectations of Firms
30042.authors: Bernardo Candia, Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
30042.abstract: Using surveys of firms around the world, we review existing evidence on how firms form their macroeconomic expectations. Several facts stand out. First, the mean inflation forecasts of firms often deviate significantly from those of professional forecasters and households. Second, disagreement about inflation among firms is large. Third, firms often change their short-run and long-run inflation expectations jointly and by similar amounts. Fourth, firms in economies with a history of low and stable inflation are inattentive to inflation and monetary policy, but this is less true in countries with more volatile environments. Fifth, firms form expectations about inflation and the real economy jointly, but the way in which they do can differ widely across countries. Finally, we show that conditioning on firms’ inflation expectations generates a stable Phillips curve relationship. We also review evidence showing that exogenous variation in the macroeconomic expectations of firms affects their decisions.
30042.zh_abstract: 利用全球范围内的企业调查，我们回顾了关于企业如何形成其宏观经济预期的现有证据。几个事实尤为突出。第一，企业的平均通胀预测常常显著偏离专业预测者和家庭的预测。第二，企业之间关于通胀的分歧很大。第三，企业经常同时且以相似幅度改变其短期和长期通胀预期。第四，在具有低且稳定通胀历史的经济体中，企业对通胀和货币政策关注不足，但在环境更不稳定的国家中情况则不然。第五，企业共同形成关于通胀和实体经济的预期，但其方式在不同国家可能差异很大。最后，我们表明，以企业的通胀预期为条件，会生成一条稳定的菲利普斯曲线。我们还回顾了证据，显示企业宏观经济预期的外生变化会影响其决策。

30041.title: Housing Demand and Remote Work
30041.abstract: We show that the shift to remote work explains over one-half of the 18.9 percent increase in U.S. real house prices from 2019 to 2023. Using variation in remote work exposure across metropolitan areas, we estimate that an additional percentage point of remote work causes a 0.92 percent increase in house prices after controlling for spillovers from migration. This finding reflects an increase in demand for home space: remote work causes an increase in residential rents, a decline in commercial rents, and a greater increase in prices for larger homes. The cross-sectional effect on house prices combined with the aggregate shift to remote work implies that remote work raised real house prices by 11.9 percent. We show that our cross-sectional estimate is a sufficient statistic for extrapolation to the true aggregate effect in a wide class of models. Our results argue for a fundamentals-based explanation for the recent increases in housing costs over speculation or financial factors, and introduce an empirical solution to the aggregation problem of cross-sectional estimates when it is possible to control for spillovers.
30041.zh_abstract: 我们表明，向远程工作的转变解释了2019年至2023年美国实际房价18.9%涨幅中的一半以上。利用不同大都市区远程工作暴露程度的差异，在控制了移民溢出效应后，我们估计远程工作比例每增加一个百分点，房价就会上涨0.92%。这一发现反映了对居住空间需求的增加：远程工作导致住宅租金上涨、商业租金下降，并且大户型住宅的价格涨幅更大。房价的横截面效应与向远程工作的总体转变相结合，意味着远程工作使实际房价提高了11.9%。我们表明，在广泛类别的模型中，我们的横截面估计是推断真实总体效应的充分统计量。我们的结果支持基于基本面的解释，而非投机或金融因素，来说明近期住房成本上涨的原因，并引入了一种实证解决方案，用于在可能控制溢出效应时处理横截面估计的加总问题。
30041.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PR；JEL：E31, E66, M11, R21, R31

30040.title: Understanding of Trade
30040.abstract: This paper sheds new light on two questions: How do people perceive and understand trade and trade policy, and what shapes their support for different trade policies? Despite extensive research documenting the efficiency gains from trade and its distributional impacts on different groups of workers, firms, and consumers, we still need to uncover how people perceive these various effects of trade. Trade involves many trade-offs. When forming their views on trade policy, people have to balance their roles as consumers and workers, consider both personal and broader economic and societal impacts, and evaluate concerns of efficiency and equity. Which of these considerations matters most? Using new large-scale surveys and experiments, I highlight three main findings. First, while earlier work has established that consumer gains from trade are diffuse and job losses are concentrated, I directly show the impact of these two considerations on people’s views about trade. I find that perceived job risks matter more for policy views than perceived consumer gains. Second, beyond their own material self-interest, people care about the broader efficiency gains and adverse distributional consequences from trade. Support for free trade is best predicted by the belief that trade generates efficiency gains. Concerns about the adverse distributional consequences of trade do not necessarily reduce support for free trade: instead, they increase support for compensatory redistribution. These results also highlight the importance of compensatory redistribution as an indissociable part of trade policy in people’s minds. Third, personal exposure to trade shapes policy views in two ways: directly (through self-interest) and indirectly by changing people’s perceptions of trade’s broader efficiency and distributional implications.
30040.zh_abstract: 本文为两个问题提供了新的见解：人们如何感知和理解贸易及贸易政策，以及什么因素塑造了他们对不同贸易政策的支持？尽管已有大量研究记录了贸易带来的效率提升及其对不同工人、企业和消费者群体的分配效应，但我们仍需揭示人们如何感知贸易的这些不同影响。贸易涉及许多权衡。在形成对贸易政策的看法时，人们必须平衡其作为消费者和工人的角色，考虑个人以及更广泛的经济和社会影响，并评估效率和公平方面的关切。这些考虑因素中哪些最重要？通过使用新的大规模调查和实验，我强调了三个主要发现。首先，虽然早期研究已确定贸易的消费者收益是分散的，而失业是集中的，但我直接展示了这两种考虑因素对人们贸易观点的影响。我发现，感知到的就业风险比感知到的消费者收益对政策观点的影响更大。其次，除了自身的物质利益之外，人们还关心贸易带来的更广泛的效率提升和不利的分配后果。对自由贸易的支持最好通过相信贸易能产生效率提升来预测。对贸易不利分配后果的担忧并不一定会减少对自由贸易的支持：相反，它增加了对补偿性再分配的支持。这些结果也凸显了补偿性再分配在人们心目中作为贸易政策不可分割部分的重要性。第三，个人对贸易的暴露通过两种方式塑造政策观点：直接地（通过自身利益）和间接地，通过改变人们对贸易更广泛的效率和分配影响的看法。
30040.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, POL；JEL：D72, D91, F1, F13

30039.title: Steering a Ship in Illiquid Waters: Active Management of Passive Funds
30039.zh_title: 在流动性不足的水域中掌舵：被动基金的主动管理
30039.authors: Naz Koont, Yiming Ma, Lubos Pastor, Yao Zeng, Yao Zeng
30039.abstract: Exchange-traded funds (ETFs) are typically viewed as passive index trackers. In contrast, we show that corporate bond ETFs actively manage their portfolios, trading off index tracking against liquidity transformation. In our model, ETFs optimally choose creation and redemption baskets that include cash and only a subset of index assets, especially if those assets are illiquid. Our evidence supports the model. We find that ETFs dynamically adjust their baskets to correct portfolio imbalances while facilitating ETF arbitrage. Basket inclusion improves bond liquidity in general, but worsens it in periods of large imbalance between creations and redemptions, such as the COVID-19 crisis.
30039.zh_abstract: 交易所交易基金通常被视为被动的指数跟踪者。相比之下，我们表明公司债券ETF主动管理其投资组合，在指数跟踪与流动性转换之间进行权衡。在我们的模型中，ETF最优地选择包含现金和仅部分指数资产（尤其是当这些资产流动性不足时）的创建和赎回篮子。我们的证据支持该模型。我们发现，ETF动态调整其篮子以纠正投资组合失衡，同时促进ETF套利。篮子纳入通常能改善债券流动性，但在创建和赎回之间出现严重失衡的时期（例如COVID-19危机期间）则会恶化流动性。

30038.title: Liquidity Traps, Prudential Policies, and International Spillovers
30038.zh_title: 流动性陷阱、审慎政策与国际溢出效应
30038.abstract: We investigate optimal monetary and macroprudential policies in an open economy with aggregate demand externalities and an occasionally binding zero lower bound constraint. Our analysis highlights that the optimal policy balances output stabilization and capital flow management. When macroprudential policy is available, monetary policy stabilizes the output gap. By contrast, when macroprudential policy is not available, monetary policy is used prudentially. However, contrary to a widespread view, raising the interest rate is not necessarily the optimal prudential policy. Finally, we show that international spillovers operate through the world real rate, but macroprudential policies provide insulation from the adverse effects of foreign policies.
30038.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在存在总需求外部性和零下限约束偶尔具有约束力的开放经济中的最优货币政策和宏观审慎政策。我们的分析强调，最优政策平衡了产出稳定和资本流动管理。当宏观审慎政策可用时，货币政策用于稳定产出缺口。相比之下，当宏观审慎政策不可用时，货币政策被审慎地使用。然而，与普遍观点相反，提高利率并不一定是最优的审慎政策。最后，我们表明国际溢出效应通过世界实际利率发挥作用，但宏观审慎政策提供了免受外国政策不利影响的隔离。
30038.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E23, E43, E44, E52, E62, F32

30037.title: Price Theory for Incomplete Markets
30037.zh_title: 不完全市场的价格理论
30037.authors: Emmanuel Farhi, Alan Olivi, Iván Werning
30037.abstract: We provide a price theory for incomplete markets that extends the traditional Walrasian analysis. We derive formulas expressing the consumption response to current and future changes in interest rates and income. Our analysis provides a natural decomposition of these responses into substitution and income effects with structural interpretation, emphasizing statistics such as the marginal propensity to save and local measures of prudence in utility. We handle general uncertainty in a compact and intuitive manner by adjusting probability distributions: a risk-adjusted probability, commonly used in finance, and a novel prudence-adjusted probability, specifically useful for incomplete markets. Our formulas reveal various cross-restrictions implied by the theory on consumer behavior. Numerical explorations show that the new statistics we identify matter significantly to understand aggregate demand in incomplete markets, beyond the impact of heterogeneous marginal propensities to consume or binding borrowing constraints.
30037.zh_abstract: 我们为不完全市场提供了一种价格理论，扩展了传统的瓦尔拉斯分析。我们推导出公式，用以表达消费对利率和收入当前及未来变化的反应。我们的分析将这些反应自然地分解为具有结构性解释的替代效应和收入效应，强调了诸如边际储蓄倾向和效用中审慎性的局部度量等统计量。我们通过调整概率分布，以紧凑且直观的方式处理一般不确定性：一种是金融中常用的风险调整概率，另一种是新颖的审慎性调整概率，特别适用于不完全市场。我们的公式揭示了理论对消费者行为隐含的各种交叉约束。数值探索表明，我们识别出的新统计量对于理解不完全市场中的总需求至关重要，其影响超越了异质性边际消费倾向或约束性借贷约束的影响。

30036.title: The Link between Health and Working Longer: Disparities in Work Capacity
30036.zh_title: 健康与延长工作年限之间的联系：工作能力的差异
30036.authors: Benjamin Berger, Italo Lopez Garcia, Nicole Maestas, Kathleen J. Mullen
30036.abstract: Good health is important for employment at older ages. However, little is known about how health-related functional abilities interact with occupational demands to shape work capacity. Using new data, we quantify individuals’ functional abilities, combine that information with occupation-specific ability requirements, and create new measures of individuals’ potential occupations and earnings. We find that average functional abilities, potential occupations, and potential earnings decline only slightly with age, indicating that many Americans maintain work capacity into their late 60s. Gaps in work capacity by race/ethnicity and gender are small, suggesting health is not a major driver of observed earnings disparities. However, gaps in work capacity by education are large and increase with age, suggesting diminished prospects for working longer among those with less education. Although work capacity among Black respondents improves across cohorts, today’s middle-aged white Americans have lower work capacity than those now at retirement age, suggesting rising rates of work disability as these cohorts age.
30036.zh_abstract: 良好的健康状况对于老年就业至关重要。然而，关于健康相关的功能能力如何与职业需求相互作用以塑造工作能力，我们知之甚少。利用新数据，我们量化了个体的功能能力，将这些信息与特定职业的能力要求相结合，并创建了个体潜在职业和收入的新衡量指标。我们发现，平均功能能力、潜在职业和潜在收入随年龄增长仅略有下降，这表明许多美国人在接近70岁时仍保持工作能力。按种族/民族和性别划分的工作能力差距很小，表明健康并非观察到的收入差距的主要驱动因素。然而，按教育程度划分的工作能力差距很大，并随年龄增长而扩大，这表明受教育程度较低的人延长工作年限的前景黯淡。尽管黑人受访者的工作能力在代际间有所改善，但如今美国中年白人的工作能力低于那些现已达到退休年龄的人，这表明随着这些群体年龄增长，工作残疾率正在上升。

30035.title: Human Capital Growth - with Region and Gender in Perspective
30035.zh_title: 人力资本增长——区域与性别视角
30035.authors: Gang Liu, Barbara M. Fraumeni, Shunsuke Managi
30035.abstract: Chapter 6 from the forthcoming Inclusive Wealth Report 2022 looks at human capital in greater detail, based on the latest human capital estimates from the Inclusive Wealth Report (IWR) project. In the chapter, which is repeated here, the growth of human capital and several of its constituent factors are broken down by gender and by region, and in some cases also by income, since apparently, human capital in the world is not evenly distributed across different regions or countries by income, or between educated males and females, although in almost all country cases total and per capita human capital have grown over time. The purpose is to identify the sources of human capital growth by region, gender, and various determining factors over the observed time period, 1990-2020.
30035.zh_abstract: 即将发布的《2022年包容性财富报告》第6章基于包容性财富报告项目的最新人力资本估计，更详细地审视了人力资本。在本章中，人力资本及其若干构成因素的增长按性别和区域进行了细分，在某些情况下也按收入进行了细分，因为显然世界范围内的人力资本在不同区域或不同收入水平的国家之间，或在受过教育的男性和女性之间分布并不均匀，尽管在几乎所有国家案例中，总人力资本和人均人力资本都随时间增长。其目的是识别在1990-2020年观测期内，按区域、性别和各种决定因素划分的人力资本增长来源。

30034.title: The Secular Decline in Private Firm Leverage
30034.zh_title: 私营企业杠杆率的长期下降
30034.authors: Aymeric Bellon, Christine L. Dobridge, Erik P. Gilje, Andrew Whitten
30034.abstract: Using firm-level administrative tax data, we document dramatic reductions in private leverage since the Global Financial Crisis, while leverage among public firms rose during this period. Changing firm characteristics are unable to account for this pattern. Younger and smaller private firms experience large declines in leverage. Reduced lever-age among private firms is correlated with lower investment. The decline in private firm leverage and investment is strongly related to plausibly exogenous increases in local area bank capital requirements. Our findings suggest that banks’ credit supply plays a prominent role in explaining the leverage pattern of private firms.
30034.zh_abstract: 利用企业层面的行政税收数据，我们记录了自全球金融危机以来私营企业杠杆率的大幅下降，而同期上市公司的杠杆率却有所上升。企业特征的变化无法解释这一模式。较年轻和较小的私营企业经历了杠杆率的大幅下降。私营企业杠杆率的降低与较低的投资水平相关。私营企业杠杆率和投资的下降与当地银行资本要求的、看似外生的增加密切相关。我们的发现表明，银行信贷供给在解释私营企业杠杆率模式方面发挥着突出作用。

30033.title: Noisy Global Value Chains
30033.authors: Ha Bui, Zhen Huo, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
30033.abstract: We study international propagation of both fundamental and non-fundamental shocks in a global production network model with information frictions. Producers in a sector do not perfectly observe other country-sector fundamentals, and their production decisions depend on their beliefs about worldwide exogenous states as well as other producers’ behavior. In this environment, “noise” shocks – errors in the public signals about fundamentals – propagate internationally and generate aggregate fluctuations. Using a novel panel dataset containing the frequencies of country-industry-specific economic news reports by 11 leading newspapers in the G7 plus Spain, we show that greater news coverage is associated with both smaller GDP forecast errors, and less disagreement among forecasters. We use these empirical regularities to discipline the parameters governing the severity of information frictions. We find that noise shocks are a quantitatively important source of international fluctuations.
